title: t02-cowboy-identity-gpt
prompt:
STYLE: European bande dessinée ink wash. Duotone palette — warm cream paper + sepia/olive ink. Loose confident linework, cross-hatch for shadow and material texture, atmospheric falloff in the distance. No vibrant color, no rendered polish, no photographic detail.

MCU of the cowboy from Image 1 standing at the edge of a mesa overlook, late afternoon, alone, looking out across the valley, wind in the scarf, three-quarter front angle, fills the right two thirds of frame. Preserve face/beard/hat/scarf/jacket/build from Image 1. Borrow ink wash, duotone palette, linework, cross-hatch from Image 2. Do NOT borrow subject or composition from Image 2.
